instruction: How do I reset my account password?
response: Go to the login page, click 'Forgot password', and follow the emailed reset link to set a new one.

instruction: What is your refund policy?
response: We offer full refunds within 30 days of purchase, provided the item is unused and in its original packaging.

instruction: How can I track my order?
response: Log into your account and open the Orders tab, where each order shows real-time tracking status and estimated delivery.

instruction: Do you offer international shipping?
response: Yes, we ship to over 40 countries, with shipping costs and delivery times calculated at checkout based on destination.

instruction: How do I cancel my subscription?
response: Open Account Settings, select Subscriptions, and click Cancel next to the plan you want to stop renewing.

instruction: What payment methods do you accept?
response: We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and Apple Pay for both one-time purchases and recurring subscriptions.

instruction: Can I change my shipping address after ordering?
response: Contact support within one hour of placing the order and we can usually update the address before it ships.

instruction: How long does standard shipping take?
response: Standard shipping typically takes 5 to 7 business days depending on your location and current carrier volume.

instruction: Is there a mobile app available?
response: Yes, our mobile app is available for both iOS and Android and offers the same features as the website.

instruction: How do I contact customer support?
response: You can reach support via live chat, email, or phone, all listed on the Contact Us page of our site.

instruction: What should I do if my package arrives damaged?
response: Take photos of the damage and contact support within 48 hours so we can arrange a free replacement or refund.

instruction: Can I use multiple discount codes on one order?
response: Only one discount code can be applied per order, and it will be the highest-value code you enter at checkout.

instruction: How do I update my billing information?
response: Go to Account Settings, select Billing, and edit your card details or billing address at any time.

instruction: Do you offer gift cards?
response: Yes, digital gift cards are available in several denominations and are delivered instantly by email after purchase.

instruction: What is your warranty coverage?
response: All products include a one-year manufacturer warranty covering defects in materials and workmanship under normal use.

instruction: How do I create an account?
response: Click Sign Up in the top right corner, enter your email and a password, then verify your address to finish.

instruction: Can I return a sale item?
response: Sale items can be returned for store credit within 14 days, though they are not eligible for cash refunds.

instruction: How do I apply for a job at your company?
response: Visit our Careers page to browse open roles and submit your resume directly through the online application form.

instruction: What happens if an item is out of stock?
response: You can join the waitlist on the product page and we will email you as soon as it becomes available.

instruction: How do I enable two-factor authentication?
response: In Account Settings under Security, toggle on two-factor authentication and follow the prompts to link your phone.

instruction: Can I combine multiple orders into one shipment?
response: If orders are placed on the same day before they ship, contact support and we can often combine them for you.

instruction: How do I delete my account?
response: Go to Account Settings, select Privacy, and choose Delete Account, then confirm through the emailed verification link.
